title: Gaming of Ammo
description: Attacking with many thingies that are fun, will be doing some kinds of improvements
body:
# **A very fun mod with many things**
Made with MCreator
Namespace: gaming (I don't know why I chose that)
This mod does not upload any data and does not bypass Mojang's security restrictions.
## Items:
### Grenade:
1. crafting will cause a probability of **exploding**
2. right click or throwing it out will cause **_explosions_**
3. you could throw out lots in a time and will help you fly to the sky
4. It have its own enchantment: **_bam_**, it helps to blow up every thing better, enchantment weight: 5, enchantment max level: 5
### Sand Specks:
1. a very important Material to make **the grenade**
2. made by crafting sand
3. it is irreversable!
### Gunpowder Apple:
1. it have the same usage as **the grenade**
### Adrenalin:
1. will give you the **_adrenalin effect_** after eaten
### Hormone:
1. a very strong material to use to make **adrenalin potion** and the **adrenalin**
2. edible and will return you a bottle
### Null Drug:
1. a matirial that dont have any use unless you use it to make **adrenalin**
### Lump of Gunpowder:
1. a big lump of gunpowder that could be decompressed to 4 gunpowder
2. it is irreversable!
3. it have the same usage as **the grenade**
## Command:
### **_/fly_**:
1. helps players to fly
Release 1.0.0 needs op level 2 to run
ALPHA 1.0.1 don't need any op levels to run
### **_/unfly_**:
1. stops players to fly
2. **only** the people themself could stop themself
Release 1.0.0 needs op level 2 to run
ALPHA 1.0.1 don't need any op levels to run
## Potions and Effects:
### Adrenalin Effect:
1. gives you a short time invincibility
2. even **_/kill_** or **_setting the amount of life_** couldn't stop you
3. uses NBT flags to help
After a time, it deals 10 damages of BYPASS and will give Weakness II and Wither I
### Adrenalin Potion:
1. **_read by your self, it is so long_**
## Blocks:
### Gunpowder Object Ore:
1. burning it returns a **lump of gunpowder**
## Advencements:
### Boom!:
1. you only needed a **grenade**
### Drug Time!:
1. you only needed some **adrenalin**
### Ouch!:
1. you needed another player to attack you
## Damage Type:
### Bypass:
1. the strongest type of damage
2. could even bypass the **_adrenalin effect_**
